{extend name='layouts/cms'} {block name='body-content'}
{if $key=='type' OR $key=='location' OR $key=='booth' OR $key=='origin_country' OR $key=='country'} {else /} {/if}
one option for one line
{$article['options']}
{if $key == 'product'} {/if} {:token()}
{/block} {block name='single-content'} {/block}
